---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a release, routing, installer, or MCP improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal / 目标

What should this project help users do?

## Proposed Change / 建议改动

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Alternatives / 备选方案

What else did you consider?

## Safety / 安全边界

Could this touch real user profiles, credentials, network access, or destructive local operations?
